message: okay, we're here. this is the one - jalapeño corn dog bites goes live in minutes and i just want to say... you all actually nailed this.
Yeah, well. You pushed us to listen instead of defend - that's the difference.
That listening thing - that's what made the copy land instead of perform, and I think people will feel that difference when they read it.
That means everything coming from you - seriously, I was nervous this whole week you'd think I was steering us wrong.
You did the work. That's what matters - the rest is just noise.
The cornmeal-to-jalapeno balance you got right - that's the thing people will taste first, and the copy just had to stay out of the way and let them see it.
